text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Tachyon, thank you again for the supplements!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ah, right. Well? Did they help your eye fatigue?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yes! By the next day, I was able to read the book
I'd been dying to finish.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Any other changes? Any muscle spasms,
increased blood circulation, or fits of ecstasy?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
No, not at all! I actually felt more relaxed than
normal. It was like all my stress just disappeared...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Just what is in those supplements? I'm sure it took
a long time to come up with the current formula.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Ah, no, those supplements were created for
a previous body modification experiment of mine,
so—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Training is already so stressful on its own. I can't
believe you're also studying medicine on the side!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Do you have any tips for efficient studying? I'd
love to hear them if you do!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh... What an intriguing response. Heh... You're
quite the dangerous one, if I do say so myself.
